items.headline: Modal Labs raises $355M Series C at $4.65B — serverless AI infrastructure 5x revenue in 8 months
Anthropic 'Code w/ Claude' London event — 'dreaming' agent memory feature announced
Mercury raises $200M Series D at $5.2B — 1 in 3 US startups, federal bank charter conditional approval
KPMG + Anthropic global alliance — 276,000 employees get Claude via Digital Gateway
YC W26 Demo Day June 16 — 64% B2B batch, projected 10% unicorn rate
Microsoft canceling internal Claude Code licenses by June 30, shifting to GitHub Copilot CLI
Claude Mythos: Anthropic's frontier model with nation-state cyber capabilities not publicly released
Giro d'Italia: Vingegaard takes Maglia Rosa with Stage 14 solo victory, 2:26 lead over Eulálio
Humanoid robots showing clearer industrial ROI as deployment costs fall; JAL deploys Unitree at Haneda
BCG study: 27% of AI users are Self-Automators developing neither AI nor domain skills — 'cognitive debt'
$5.5B capital targets AI deployment gap in one quarter; infrastructure layer emerges as consensus VC bet
Series A bar rising: investors now require $2M+ ARR and $0.50 burn per $1 new ARR in 2026
30-year Treasury yield hits 5.19% — highest since pre-2008 financial crisis; S&P retreats from highs
Anthropic raises $65B at $965B valuation — most valuable AI startup in history; Opus 4.8 released with 1,000-subagent dynamic workflows
OpenRouter raises $113M Series B led by CapitalG at $1.3B; weekly token volume grows from 5T to 25T in 6 months
Corgi raises $106M Series B1 at $2.6B — AI-native insurance infrastructure with embedded underwriting and claims automation
Jonas Vingegaard wins 2026 Giro d'Italia in Rome — five stage wins, Felix Gall 2nd, Jai Hindley 3rd
China accelerates embodied AI development at 50%+ annual growth; targets ¥1 trillion ($146B) market by 2035
MOIA + Uber begin LA autonomous microbus testing; Aurora expands US Sun Belt driverless routes by year-end
Hark raises $700M Series A at $6B valuation — Brett Adcock's 'universal AI interface' personal AI hardware startup
Gartner: 40% of enterprise apps will integrate AI agents by end of 2026, up from less than 5% in 2025
S&P 500 hits intraday ATH of 7,539; QQQ closes at record 738.32 — Iran deal speculation drives risk-on week
